column1: # TileCal Cell Mapping — CGV path ↔ ATLAS readout cell
#   sub=1  → sampling A  (camada mais interna, radialmente)
#   η > 0, |η| < ~1.0  → LBA (Long Barrel A-side)   → volumes TileXp, X=1,23,4
#   η < 0, |η| < ~1.0  → LBC (Long Barrel C-side)   → volumes TileXn
#   η > 0, |η| > ~0.9  → EBA (Extended Barrel A-side)→ volumes TileXp, X=5..15
#   η < 0, |η| > ~0.9  → EBC (Extended Barrel C-side)→ volumes TileXn
# phi módulo j (0-63): calculado de phi_hit via floor((phi+π)×64/(2π)) mod 64
# Caminho CGV completo para eta_tower=i, phi_module=j:
# Coluna "notes": (*) = valor aproximado, verificar com dados reais
